title: Enki – memory for AI agents that keeps ~half as much and answers as well
abstract: Enki – memory for AI agents that keeps ~half as much and answers as well provides a complete agent runtime with workflow orchestration, tool integration, and memory management. Production-ready wit...
abstract_zh: 都说AI Agent是下一个风口，Enki – memory for AI agents that keeps ~half as much and answers as well 就是那个让你先上车的好工具。工作流编排、工具调用、记忆管理全包了，不用从零造轮子。
